{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323191428954C5DF59BA969CA8456\"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7612479860225557273","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"视角独特，没有无脑系统，论证有据，少有的历史穿越文，喜欢看[马上有福][马上有福]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772421503,"group_id":"7610263286415625240","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0DwssGCzmtgzWmatELB8nuIDvDs0BpucYuGrvn0YhhD","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3580455771969831","user_name":"巴脱巴的贺云飞"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3580455771969831","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7610263286415625240","book_info":{"abstract":"地理系毕业大学生赵默雷雨天放无人机被雷击穿越到宋朝，没有原主的完整记忆，开局就被包拯判死刑；危机之下放大招，用宋仁宗无子的现代科学推测保住性命；因此也得罪了许多人，只能不断震惊包大人，依靠包大人的庇护生存；没想到原主身份居然不简单，是宋仁宗原本夭折的长子；出生时被御医判为夭折，恰逢老道赵自然入宫拜谒先帝，承担皇子丧葬，救活后因情况复杂，悄悄养在民间二十年。在包拯的庇护下，最终被宋仁宗确立为皇子、太子，继承皇位；依靠超越古人的认知进行诸多改革，稳步推进，强大国力，拳打西夏，脚踩北辽；甚至生出了远迈汉唐的野心。一个经济文化世界巅峰、人杰辈出的时代，但也是一个武力疲弱、毫无血性的时代；因赵默的到来碰撞出绚丽的光芒！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/d2e1254c9e47a9f999277da464d64113~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"老猫的口粮","author_id":"","book_id":"7610263286415625240","book_name":"穿越北宋靠震惊包拯活命","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8d0a8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5922人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":273,\"name\":\"历史古代\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273\u0026name=历史古代\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":501,\"name\":\"宋朝\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=501\u0026name=宋朝\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":852,\"name\":\"魂穿\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852\u0026name=魂穿\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7610263899669021208","read_count":"5922","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"222274"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"81","tags":"历史古代,历史,宋朝,魂穿,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d2e1254c9e47a9f999277da464d64113~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779448468\u0026x-signature=PK8ldL7X0ZYkgIpTTmWYd%2FxPJlI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4217353315293171","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"10"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323191428954C5DF59BA969CA8456\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4931,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":42},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7610263286415625240","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"","genre":"","genre_typ
